user_story: As an HR admin, I want to select an employee class and location before configuring access, so that permissions apply to the correct group
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Access Permission screen; When I select an Employee class and Location; Then the field permission matrix loads for that combination

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to set View and Edit permissions per field for HR, Reporting Manager and Employee, so that each role only accesses appropriate employee data
acceptance_criteria: Given I have selected an employee class and location; When I toggle View and Edit for a field per role; Then those field-level permissions are applied

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to configure access across employee data tabs such as General Information, Personal Details, Documents and Employee Status, so that permissions are managed per section
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Access Permission screen; When I switch to a data tab; Then I can set field permissions for that tab

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to apply the tab settings to other employee classes and locations, so that I avoid repeating configuration
acceptance_criteria: Given I have configured permissions for one class and location; When I select other employee class(es) and location(s) to apply to; Then the same settings are copied to them

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to answer configuration questions like whether the employee is on the bench report, is billable, or can be created in Wrike, so that downstream systems and reports are driven correctly
acceptance_criteria: Given I am configuring access permissions; When I set the bench report, billable and Wrike questions; Then those settings are saved with the configuration

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save the access configuration and continue to the next tab, so that I can complete configuration efficiently
acceptance_criteria: Given I have set permissions on a tab; When I click Save or Save & Next; Then the settings are persisted and I advance to the next tab
